claim_statement: The odd/even acoustic peak ratio in Planck TT encodes the Sigma_hist / Sigma_inst ratio, yielding an effective dark matter fraction Omega_DM^QNG consistent with the observed 0.27 without dark matter particles.
dataset: Planck CMB TT power spectrum (full, R3.01)
method: 1) Locate acoustic peaks in TT spectrum: find local maxima at ell ~ 220 (peak 1), ell ~ 540 (peak 2), ell ~ 820 (peak 3). 2) Compute amplitude ratios A2/A1 and A3/A1. 3) Using Hu-Sugiyama approximation, derive effective baryon fraction f_b = Sigma_inst / Sigma_hist from the peak ratios. 4) Compute Omega_DM^QNG = 1 - f_b and compare to observed Omega_DM = 0.274 +/- 0.020 (Planck 2018).
pass_condition: Derived Omega_DM^QNG within 2-sigma of observed 0.274, OR the required Sigma_hist/Sigma_inst ratio is physically motivated by QNG memory dynamics.
fail_condition: No assignment of Sigma_hist / Sigma_inst can reproduce Omega_DM in [0.20, 0.35] from the observed peak ratios.

decision.note: Awaiting implementation. Key deliverable: Sigma_hist/Sigma_inst ratio consistent with Omega_DM ~ 0.27.
